meta.name: StockPulse Semi Supply Chain
meta.author: Przemek
meta.description: Warstwa obserwacyjna — łańcuch dostaw półprzewodników. Observation mode: dane zbierane, alerty w DB, Telegram wyłączony do czasu walidacji backtestem.

memory_producers.description: Upstream — producenci pamięci DRAM/NAND. Bezpośrednia ekspozycja na cykle cenowe pamięci.

companies.name: Micron Technology
companies.notes: Largest US memory maker. DRAM ~70% rev. HBM growth driver for AI.

companies.name: Western Digital
companies.notes: Flash + HDD dual business. Spun off Sandisk flash in 2024. Pure HDD after split.

companies.name: Seagate Technology
companies.notes: Pure HDD play. Nearline drives for cloud/AI data centers. High dividend yield.

equipment_packaging.description: Picks & shovels — sprzęt i opakowania półprzewodników. Wczesny wskaźnik capex cycle.

companies.name: Kulicke and Soffa Industries
companies.notes: World leader in semiconductor bonding equipment. Advanced packaging for AI chips.

companies.name: Amkor Technology
companies.notes: Top 2 global OSAT. Advanced packaging (SiP, fan-out) growing for AI/5G.

companies.name: Onto Innovation
companies.notes: Process control for advanced packaging. Merger of Nanometrics + Rudolph Tech.

companies.name: Camtek Ltd
companies.notes: Israeli inspection equipment. Strong HBM inspection demand from memory makers.

companies.name: Nova Ltd
companies.notes: Israeli metrology. Chemical + optical metrology for advanced nodes. Growing in packaging.

companies.name: ASE Technology Holding
companies.notes: World's largest OSAT. ATM (assembly/test) + EMS. Advanced packaging leader.

oem_anti_signal.description: OEM — odbiorcy półprzewodników. Margin squeeze gdy ceny komponentów rosną. C-suite SELL może być anty-sygnał (bearish dla sektora, ale firma reaguje defensywnie).

companies.name: Dell Technologies
companies.notes: AI server growth driver. ISG (infrastructure) benefiting from AI capex cycle.

companies.name: HP Inc
companies.notes: PC + printing. AI PC refresh cycle potential. High shareholder returns.

companies.name: Hewlett Packard Enterprise
companies.notes: Enterprise servers + networking. Juniper Networks acquisition pending.

companies.name: Super Micro Computer
companies.notes: AI server leader. High revenue growth, low margins. Audit/governance concerns 2024.

companies.name: NetApp
companies.notes: Enterprise storage. All-flash array growth. Cloud storage partnerships.
